# Smit Parekh — llms.txt
# AI-readable site guide for LLM-based search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude)
# Spec: https://llmstxt.org

# ─── About ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
> Smit Parekh is a Digital Software Developer and SEO Specialist based in Anand, Gujarat, India.
> He builds free online productivity tools and offers professional web development and SEO services.

# ─── Key Pages ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

## Free Tools (primary value proposition)

- [Free Online Tools Hub](https://www.smitparekh.co.in/): Collection of 8+ free productivity tools.
- [AI LinkedIn Post Generator](https://www.smitparekh.co.in/free-tools/viral-linkedin-post-generator): Create high-engagement LinkedIn posts using AI. Free, no sign-up required.
- [Background Remover](https://www.smitparekh.co.in/free-tools/background-remover): Remove image backgrounds instantly. AI-powered, supports PNG/JPEG/WebP output.
- [SEO Analyzer](https://www.smitparekh.co.in/free-tools/seo-analyzer): Audit 50+ SEO factors for any website. Provides actionable recommendations.
- [Meta Tag Checker](https://www.smitparekh.co.in/free-tools/meta-tag-checker): Inspect and validate meta tags, Open Graph, and Twitter Card data.
- [Image Compressor](https://www.smitparekh.co.in/free-tools/image-compressor): Reduce image file size without visible quality loss.
- [Image Converter](https://www.smitparekh.co.in/free-tools/image-converter): Convert between PNG, JPEG, WebP, and other image formats.
- [QR Code Generator](https://www.smitparekh.co.in/free-tools/qr-code-generator): Generate customizable QR codes for URLs, text, or vCards.
- [LinkedIn Media Downloader](https://www.smitparekh.co.in/free-tools/linkedin-media-downloader): Download videos and images from public LinkedIn posts.

## Portfolio & Services

- [Portfolio](https://www.smitparekh.co.in/portfolio): Developer portfolio with projects, skills, and experience.
- [Services](https://www.smitparekh.co.in/services): Web development, SEO optimization, and digital marketing services.
- [Projects Gallery](https://www.smitparekh.co.in/project): Showcases of built applications and client work.
- [Contact](https://www.smitparekh.co.in/contact): Hire Smit Parekh for freelance projects.

## Credentials

- [Skills](https://www.smitparekh.co.in/skills): Technical skills including React.js, Node.js, JavaScript, Python, SEO tools.
- [Qualifications](https://www.smitparekh.co.in/qualification): Education at Gujarat Technological University.
- [CV / Resume](https://www.smitparekh.co.in/cv-viewer): Downloadable resume.
